130414.label: PL0500_vo_DUO_rescue2_B
130414.transcript: Can't lie around all day, can I?

2853596.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
2853596.transcript: Retirement can wait! I'm still kickin'!

3401286.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
3401286.transcript: Could we tone it down a little?

7361693.label: PL0500_vo_NAV_throw_default_reaction_2
7361693.transcript: Got him where we want him!

27250671.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
27250671.transcript: Anybody else ready to end this sucker?

28373805.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
28373805.transcript: What about your centuries of experience?

33085950.label: PL0500_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
33085950.transcript: Alright, let's keep our wits about us.

34816805.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
34816805.transcript: Put your backs into it, folks!

43459125.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
43459125.transcript: Man, your energy's infectious! Let's move!

54017688.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
54017688.transcript: Get out of our damn way already!

72968461.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
72968461.transcript: Kinda surprised you don't drop the act during battle. Scary.

73168733.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
73168733.transcript: You messed around! Now you're gonna find out!

82755677.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
82755677.transcript: Gonna take a lot more to take us down!

85514695.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
85514695.transcript: And that was just the warm-up!

87354452.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
87354452.transcript: The wind's blowing in our favor now!

88780924.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
88780924.transcript: Swords be damned! Still got her in my sights!

92445667.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
92445667.transcript: Wish I had me some of that primal power!

96537749.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
96537749.transcript: Gotta punch through their plating somehow!

99453851.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
99453851.transcript: Blast through 'em if you have to!

110445386.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
110445386.transcript: You uh... don't wanna decompress or anything?

112870586.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
112870586.transcript: Call out more blades, lady! You'll need 'em!

112892937.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
112892937.transcript: Ooh! Made my beard stand on end!

120569103.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
120569103.transcript: Dang, little lady! You don't give 'em a break, do ya?

130248864.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
130248864.transcript: All these years of experience sure do come in handy.

130270445.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
130270445.transcript: You dumbos messed with the wrong crew!

134212057.label: PL0500_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_4
134212057.transcript: Let's get you back on your feet!

139269699.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
139269699.transcript: I knew you were something special, but sheesh!

144708933.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
144708933.transcript: A gentleman on and off the ice, huh?

144770102.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
144770102.transcript: Played our hand well there, but the game's not over.

158652076.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
158652076.transcript: We won't abandon one of our own!

159755116.label: PL0500_vo_DMG_rise_5
159755116.transcript: Got one over on me, did ya?

161992774.label: PL0500_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
161992774.transcript: And just when I thought we had it licked!

165640148.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
165640148.transcript: Let's move! Don't wanna stick around here any longer than we have to!

170133542.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
170133542.transcript: Feels funny gettin' a compliment from a living legend.

172277385.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
172277385.transcript: Had it up to here with these tin cans!

175238475.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
175238475.transcript: Think I pulled something in my back!

177079485.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
177079485.transcript: Let's say we deal the final blow here!

181958592.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
181958592.transcript: Feeling light on your feet today or what?

188942161.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
188942161.transcript: Ish! Makes me feel old when you say 'sir' like that!

189352757.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
189352757.transcript: Think you could take down something twice as big?

189837466.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
189837466.transcript: I gotta do sum with all this exp, don't I?

197789196.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
197789196.transcript: You're in top fighting form today!

201930289.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
201930289.transcript: Fighting in Zegagrande ain't so different, is it?

207232750.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
207232750.transcript: Cute how y'all think you have a chance.

218879735.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
218879735.transcript: Got a bullet with your name on it!

219636720.label: PL0500_vo_DMG_down_3
219636720.transcript: I'm not out for the count yet!

232534116.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B
232534116.transcript: Didn't do half bad, did we?

238545087.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
238545087.transcript: You're one of us now, ain't ya?

242327589.label: PL0500_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
242327589.transcript: We got a pincer! I repeat, we got a pincer!

244356947.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
244356947.transcript: You're just blowing smoke up my keister!

252622271.label: PL0500_vo_NAV_enemy_break_reaction_B
252622271.transcript: So I can go all out? Let's do it!

256376902.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
256376902.transcript: Now you're gonna be the one with mud on his face!

256634347.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_thanks_2
256634347.transcript: Man, you were a big help!

261431817.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
261431817.transcript: Well, well, well. Victory is ours.

267658465.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
267658465.transcript: You all may be younger, but I could run laps around ya!

268953941.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
268953941.transcript: Sorry to put you through the ringer.

277908464.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
277908464.transcript: Job well done! Who wants to celebrate?

282601321.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
282601321.transcript: Don't let up! We can take 'em down!

288888503.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
288888503.transcript: Protecting you, young bucks, is what I live for!

291639092.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
291639092.transcript: Raising my mustache off over here!

319076868.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
319076868.transcript: Job well done! Who wants to celebrate?

319702935.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
319702935.transcript: Watch where you throw those sparks, eh?

319858580.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
319858580.transcript: Now let's really bring the pain!

333072760.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
333072760.transcript: As if we'll let you gobble up these skies!

333122522.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
333122522.transcript: Damn wind pony again! Stay on guard, guys!

334464446.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
334464446.transcript: Ha ha! You're something else, kid!

340182359.label: PL0500_vo_ATK_ability_8_3
340182359.transcript: Have a face full of poison!

342006800.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
342006800.transcript: First the wolf! Then we catch up to Lyria!

345018116.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
345018116.transcript: Hell yeah! Keep the firepower coming!

347581992.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
347581992.transcript: Okay, so he's got scales now. So what?

350935818.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
350935818.transcript: We gotta put a stop to this right now!

354473431.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_win_2
354473431.transcript: Don't you worry. I got your back.

369820505.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
369820505.transcript: Looks like you could use another round!

371408793.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
371408793.transcript: Step right up! Don't miss the gun show!

374463702.label: PL0500_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
374463702.transcript: Great! We get to see what they're really made of!

403164983.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
403164983.transcript: Who's ready for the big finale?

410205691.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
410205691.transcript: Right? Not bad for an old merc!

427082648.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
427082648.transcript: Good job, team! You worked your butts off!

432228193.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
432228193.transcript: See, I move pretty quick for my age!

432471476.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
432471476.transcript: We've got a lot riding on you, man!

434975910.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_lockon_2
434975910.transcript: Come on, folks! We got trouble!

435391923.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
435391923.transcript: Try to stop us! Make my day!

440392520.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
440392520.transcript: Gallanza, was it? You don't know who you're messing with!

446228915.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
446228915.transcript: That's why I've been working on my core. Roots of the body.

463349300.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
463349300.transcript: Shoot! Your rippling muscles are proof of that!

476363424.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
476363424.transcript: It's the beard! Really sharpens the face, ya know!

478712172.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
478712172.transcript: The older you get, the meaner you fight!

483777360.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
483777360.transcript: Not the most welcoming of places, is it?

487820806.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_start_2
487820806.transcript: Alright! Let's get this show on the road!

494195733.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
494195733.transcript: Victory or bust! That's the Eugen guarantee!

494989720.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_comeback_2
494989720.transcript: Oh boy, back to the carnage.

511834697.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
511834697.transcript: Ugh. Some rough and tumble skies out there.

520157543.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
520157543.transcript: Avert your eyes! My good looks are blinding!

524192381.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
524192381.transcript: Heh heh! Scared all out, do ya, Captain?

526545069.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
526545069.transcript: Yeah, we seriously kick some ass!

535637284.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
535637284.transcript: Got a little too hot there!

536187247.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
536187247.transcript: Ugh. Some rough and tumble skies out there.

543000874.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
543000874.transcript: Grossome twosome over here think they stand a chance!

543842343.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
543842343.transcript: Feast your eyes! A real man stands before you!

544753004.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0100
544753004.transcript: Send 'em crawlin' back to their holes!

545982158.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
545982158.transcript: You know, I think I like our chances.

555727674.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
555727674.transcript: It's yours whenever you need it!

557817056.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_comeback_1
557817056.transcript: My bad. I'm ready to go again.

560951159.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
560951159.transcript: Guess you really have slain dragons!

563496598.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
563496598.transcript: I guess we got a little carried away!

568030201.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
568030201.transcript: Whatever happens, glad to have you!

571258404.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
571258404.transcript: That personality of yours is real prickly!

585255242.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
585255242.transcript: Don't burn out too quick now!

586447421.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_break
586447421.transcript: Don't have to tell me twice!

595570953.label: PL0500_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_3
595570953.transcript: All good! I'm back in action!

612279062.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_start_1
612279062.transcript: Come on, people! Get your keisters in gear!

614506612.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
614506612.transcript: Coming from a knight of your caliber, that really means a lot.

618208929.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
618208929.transcript: Pilot, warrior, priest—what don't you do?

620203121.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
620203121.transcript: So, do ghost puppies bite or what?

625536755.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
625536755.transcript: Nice Rackam! You been workin' on that aim?

640065725.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
640065725.transcript: Could barely keep up with you there!

660404513.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
660404513.transcript: A very fine thank you, madam knight!

662490759.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
662490759.transcript: How do you like them apples?

665984916.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
665984916.transcript: I won't look a gift horse in the mouth. Thanks, Gallanza.

673621651.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
673621651.transcript: Last anything that even looks at Astoriath!

673662155.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_call_emergency_1
673662155.transcript: Move it or lose it, folks!

675116407.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_start_2
675116407.transcript: Alright! Let's get this show on the road!

683424739.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
683424739.transcript: You make that hunk of sword look light as a feather!

692633868.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
692633868.transcript: Can't let this chance slip through our fingers!

699016277.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
699016277.transcript: Keep your wits about you, folks. It's gonna get hairy.

700090538.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
700090538.transcript: Right! Stay calm and carry a big boomstick!

703351313.label: PL0500_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_3
703351313.transcript: They don't let up, do they?

708182361.label: PL0500_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_A
708182361.transcript: Look alive! It's about to get real!

709035821.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
709035821.transcript: If it's a fight you want, it's a fight you'll get!

709402332.label: PL0500_vo_NAV_throw_slow_reaction_2
709402332.transcript: Like shootin' fish in a barrel!

716764286.label: PL0500_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_4
716764286.transcript: I'm made of pretty tough stuff!

729364742.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
729364742.transcript: Damn! Hard to get a bead on it!

736902654.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
736902654.transcript: And I've still got some juice!

736928673.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_lockon_5
736928673.transcript: I love a little gunpowder in the morning!

743065398.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
743065398.transcript: Like shootin' fish in a barrel!

743699564.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
743699564.transcript: We'll win the battle AND the war!

755160531.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
755160531.transcript: Man, I'm chompin' at the bit over here!

756383783.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
756383783.transcript: Good knowing I haven't lost my touch!

758941617.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
758941617.transcript: Finished already? Then let's hit the town!

764409569.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
764409569.transcript: Finished already? Then let's hit the town!

765439165.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
765439165.transcript: I'll take that as a thank you.

765549433.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
765549433.transcript: Then it's twenties across the board for you, bud!

774759684.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
774759684.transcript: Haha! I haven't felt this young in years!

776986033.label: PL0500_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_4
776986033.transcript: Nobody gets the best of ol' Eugen!

779478501.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
779478501.transcript: Yep! I'd trust you with my life!

780382870.label: PL0500_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
780382870.transcript: Don't go crying home to mama!

789502755.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
789502755.transcript: The monastery should be this way, right?

794353044.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
794353044.transcript: Ooh, Eugen! Always gets the job done!

798685901.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_start_1
798685901.transcript: Come on, people! Get your keisters in gear!

798730387.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
798730387.transcript: Good! Got a reputation to uphold!

800039434.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
800039434.transcript: Tell me I'm not the only one creeped out by this place.

800320544.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
800320544.transcript: Wow! You really kick ass, Rolan!

807549486.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
807549486.transcript: Let's make this next one count!

807817072.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
807817072.transcript: I feel ya. We'll hit the lake after this is all over.

812283479.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
812283479.transcript: Not sure which is faster, my bullets or your swordplay!

813506140.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
813506140.transcript: Let's save the celebrations for later!

830680836.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
830680836.transcript: Good job, team! You worked your butts off!

834666936.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
834666936.transcript: Yeah, you punks are gonna regret this!

835182705.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0000
835182705.transcript: Ha ha! Not as fierce as you, little lady!

837085409.label: PL0500_vo_DMG_down_2
837085409.transcript: Really feelin' my age over here.

837484391.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_1
837484391.transcript: I'll fight with you guys any day!

838496636.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_2
838496636.transcript: See? I can teach you a thing or two.

844957762.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
844957762.transcript: Back to Trudgen after we've caught our breath!

848713225.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
848713225.transcript: Put some grease on that one, didn't I?

851993053.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
851993053.transcript: You wanna see what a real man looks like?

865754856.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
865754856.transcript: Leave it to the master to whip some ass!

868831042.label: PL0500_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
868831042.transcript: Gotcha right where I want ya!

872379771.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
872379771.transcript: I don't like the looks of 'em.

876749956.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
876749956.transcript: You ever feel pain with that body of yours?

878792898.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
878792898.transcript: How do you stay so focused all the time?

889244011.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
889244011.transcript: Hey, was that slick or what?

892275451.label: PL0500_vo_ATK_ability_2_upper_1
892275451.transcript: Let's kick it up a notch!

905205119.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
905205119.transcript: Then we must be doing something right!

909499418.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
909499418.transcript: Think you could pull that off again?

912936150.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
912936150.transcript: Man, I'm chompin' at the bit over here!

916786065.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
916786065.transcript: You mean I didn't have it before?

918747942.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
918747942.transcript: Retirement can wait! I'm still kickin'!

929735051.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
929735051.transcript: Get ready to blast it again!

931723968.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
931723968.transcript: Is it just floating armor? Now I've seen everything!

935775921.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
935775921.transcript: Am I ever glad you had my back on that one!

943238779.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
943238779.transcript: Don't let that one go to your head!

944337289.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
944337289.transcript: They're gonna tell legends about us!

953806627.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
953806627.transcript: You've got me swooning here, son!

957120860.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
957120860.transcript: Don't say I didn't warn ya!

960303467.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
960303467.transcript: You're as pretty as a picture!

963654687.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
963654687.transcript: Wait a minute! Can I get a breather first?

966016046.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
966016046.transcript: Keep your heads in the game!

967411823.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
967411823.transcript: Wish I had your perspective when I was in my twenties.

973705522.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
973705522.transcript: These folks look like they've seen a battle or two.

984124227.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
984124227.transcript: I got plenty more tricks up the old sleeve!

985632192.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_comeback_3
985632192.transcript: Hah! I'm too young to croak!

988845851.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
988845851.transcript: Yep, we call that tailor-made cover fire!

991708859.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
991708859.transcript: Years and years of practice will do that to ya.

1008779120.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
1008779120.transcript: Got it right where we want it!

1026244270.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
1026244270.transcript: Yeah! Another one bites the dust!

1030704796.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_A
1030704796.transcript: We got a billy badass on our hands!

1036947461.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
1036947461.transcript: Hey, I like her better when she's on our side!

1039129222.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
1039129222.transcript: Hurricane gone to Oregon! Coming through!

1040749997.label: PL0500_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_3
1040749997.transcript: Trust me, that won't happen again.

1052161808.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
1052161808.transcript: Let's see how good a fighter you are. Bring it!

1052542370.label: PL0500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
1052542370.transcript: Yeah! Another one bites the dust!

1056412402.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
1056412402.transcript: Old gunner like me has one job.

1057177315.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
1057177315.transcript: Not the dancing partners I would've asked for.

1060911438.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
1060911438.transcript: Hope you saved some muscle for later!

1061445262.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
1061445262.transcript: Man, I wish I was your age again!

1061513989.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
1061513989.transcript: After seeing your handiwork, alchemy gives me the willies!

1065097496.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
1065097496.transcript: Next one's on me! I won't let you down!

4465817.label: PL0500_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL2900
4465817.transcript: Time to put up or shut up!

10539490.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
10539490.transcript: Magic and explosives are practically made for each other!

25562499.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
25562499.transcript: Dodging your puns is harder than dodging a bullet!

87424378.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
87424378.transcript: Did I cut it too close?

114315324.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
114315324.transcript: You always got my rifle when you need her.

130630628.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
130630628.transcript: Do you really have to turn him into charcoal?

149062080.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
149062080.transcript: There it is! The Fist of the Red Lotus! Man, that punch gives me goosebumps!

205074021.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
205074021.transcript: You set 'em up, I knock 'em down!

212513235.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
212513235.transcript: Don't mention it. I'm here to support.

245611067.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
245611067.transcript: Say, how'd you get so fast anyway?

251700718.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
251700718.transcript: You always leave an opening for my shots. Talk about a pro!

257163560.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
257163560.transcript: Buttering up the old man, are ya?

296517767.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
296517767.transcript: Heh! Bet you could cut through damn near anything!

300937868.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
300937868.transcript: Heh! Let's do the same to their friends!

302226576.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
302226576.transcript: Anyone ever tell you your timing is impeccable?

386527772.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
386527772.transcript: Ha ha! Sure thing! Wait... you're serious?

390948711.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
390948711.transcript: Three cheers for the captain of the Lumiel Knights!

394569654.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
394569654.transcript: Brought the boom on that one!

398273939.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
398273939.transcript: Whoa, whoa! Try to save a few scraps for the old-timer, would ya?

416021057.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
416021057.transcript: At this range, it was nothing!

417047326.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
417047326.transcript: Why are you in such a good mood?

428814298.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
428814298.transcript: What, you got a seventh sense or somethin'?

433132918.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
433132918.transcript: Bud, you could push just about anybody over.

465022192.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
465022192.transcript: Uh-oh. Good luck stopping Siegfried when he smells blood in the water.

471032554.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
471032554.transcript: Pinned him down with our crossfire!

472261639.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
472261639.transcript: See what happens when you apply yourself?

473146259.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
473146259.transcript: Make sure you don't run off too far.

477138071.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
477138071.transcript: Who's up for a little more action?

514630675.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
514630675.transcript: Heh! I keep tabs on everyone, so go hog wild!

561002174.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
561002174.transcript: Sure have, but I don't hold a candle to you yet.

562234392.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
562234392.transcript: To call you battle-tested would be an understatement.

587261484.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
587261484.transcript: So uh... still grappling with your inner demons, Narmaya?

615210046.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
615210046.transcript: My eyes ain't that old yet!

628023565.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
628023565.transcript: Hot damn, that's how you flex! You got more brawn than Einstello has islands!

657171329.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
657171329.transcript: We're on a roll! Now let's keep it that way!

660030742.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
660030742.transcript: Not at all! When I get a bead on my target, I shoot!

691100827.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
691100827.transcript: I'll take big explosions any day!

697350869.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
697350869.transcript: That couldn't have gone any better!

711651279.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
711651279.transcript: Man, love that giant thunderbolt! Looks so satisfying!

716759029.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
716759029.transcript: Come on, you're an ancient dragon. You're probably a million times wiser.

729144356.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
729144356.transcript: How did you sync with my attack so fast?

746669068.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
746669068.transcript: Watch and learn, my baby-faced sniper!

777009365.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
777009365.transcript: Oh, you saying you can outpace a bullet?

788528076.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
788528076.transcript: Don't get ahead of yourself, Beatrix!

804047915.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
804047915.transcript: I'm glad you're enjoying yourself and all, but sheesh!

819086390.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
819086390.transcript: Not sure what I just saw, but hell yeah!

823159947.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
823159947.transcript: Heh! Let's tackle bigger game next time!

823355724.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
823355724.transcript: How much lead you pumpin' that sucker?

840198479.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
840198479.transcript: Got a trigger finger that needs scratchin'!

869494700.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
869494700.transcript: Not the buzz I was looking for.

908706512.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
908706512.transcript: Now that's an idea I can get behind!

919242194.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
919242194.transcript: Yeah! How do you like them apples!

963367256.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
963367256.transcript: Become second nature after enough battles.

963640568.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
963640568.transcript: Yeah. She's somewhere far, far across the sea, watching over me.

978495375.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
978495375.transcript: The enemy has the gall to thumb its nose at us!

978499078.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
978499078.transcript: I'm the gun beneath your wings!

990127868.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
990127868.transcript: Fediel the Black! Grateful you're on our side, I'll tell you that!

997061588.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
997061588.transcript: Bet we can find room for a few more!

997286099.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
997286099.transcript: While I got your attention, drinks after at the bar?

1017351429.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
1017351429.transcript: Thanks! Gotta keep up the momentum!

1021594649.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
1021594649.transcript: Just like to keep my score up.

1028000170.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
1028000170.transcript: Hope you got more in the tank!

1035484472.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
1035484472.transcript: You holy types and your bright-ass techniques!

1040843100.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
1040843100.transcript: Probably not my business, but maybe don't stick your nose in everyone's love life.

1041724484.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
1041724484.transcript: Make good use of this next shot, alright?

1044240822.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
1044240822.transcript: Gotta live up to our resident weapon collector!

1067208410.label: PL0500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
1067208410.transcript: I could still eke out a bit more firepower.

12902013.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
12902013.transcript: Sure thing! Your wish is my command!

131056836.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
131056836.transcript: Blasted him good on that one!

205447949.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
205447949.transcript: Sure! Has a nice ring to it!

242518381.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
242518381.transcript: Time to polish the old guns! One, two, three, four, five, six! Look at that pump!

349941570.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
349941570.transcript: You're a real one for watching my flank.

379038813.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
379038813.transcript: An old fart like me still has a few tricks up his sleeve.

392693162.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
392693162.transcript: I can see why they say you've got the best eyes in the sky.

578073179.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
578073179.transcript: When it comes to guns, not even the Eternals can beat mine!

582858475.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
582858475.transcript: Hah! Still don't hold a candle to your accuracy!

592047526.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
592047526.transcript: Not bad! Not bad at all!

700306279.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
700306279.transcript: Oh, somebody's used to working with snipers!

771623594.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_3
771623594.transcript: Yeah, buddy! Step on up! Check me out!

841360603.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
841360603.transcript: You're just trying to butter me up!

845086385.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_squat_2
845086385.transcript: Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh!

953272351.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
953272351.transcript: Like an eternal needs his bacon to be saved.

993777567.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
993777567.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

221122717.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
221122717.transcript: Hey, you're lean and mean! Got any workout tips for this old timer?

279080386.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_jyanken_lose_2
279080386.transcript: You win some, you lose some.

406954133.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
406954133.transcript: There's one thing I do well, it's shooting!

613058165.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
613058165.transcript: Hah! Guess you learned a thing or two over the years!

790036388.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
790036388.transcript: Okay, it wasn't that dramatic. You can just say thanks.

515435494.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
515435494.transcript: Snack attack! Mmm. Mmm. Mmm. Need a few more!

1044364518.label: PL0500_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_1
1044364518.transcript: Lunchtime! Mmm. Does a body good.
